Li Auto ( (LI) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 24, 2026, Li Auto converted 711,481 Class B WVR ordinary shares into Class A WVR ordinary shares, slightly increasing its Hong Kong–listed Class A share count while reducing the unlisted Class B pool. Following the change, disclosed in a Next Day Disclosure Return filed with the Hong Kong exchange and reported to the U.S. SEC on April 27, 2026, total issued shares rose marginally in Class A and fell correspondingly in Class B, signalling an incremental shift in the company’s dual-class capital structure without buybacks or redemptions and with limited immediate impact on overall shareholder dilution.

The most recent analyst rating on (LI) stock is a Buy with a $22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Li Auto stock, see the LI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakening 2025 operating results and a meaningful deterioration in cash generation, partially offset by a solid balance sheet. Technicals are moderately supportive in the short-to-medium term, but valuation is expensive (very high P/E) given recent profitability volatility. Earnings-call commentary is mixed, with credible product/AI and growth initiatives balanced against near-term margin and execution headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on LI stock, click here.

More about Li Auto

Li Auto Inc., based in Beijing, is a Chinese new energy vehicle maker focused on smart electric and extended-range hybrid vehicles for the domestic market. The company is listed in the U.S. and Hong Kong and has adopted a dual-class share structure with weighted voting right (WVR) ordinary shares to support founder control while accessing global capital markets.

data.title: Noble Corporation Posts Strong Q1 Results, Boosts Backlog
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Noble Corporation ( (NE) ) has shared an update.

Noble Corporation reported solid first-quarter 2026 results on April 26, 2026, with net income rising to $121 million and adjusted EBITDA increasing to $277 million on higher fleet utilization and lower contract drilling costs. Total revenue reached $786 million, operating cash flow was $273 million, free cash flow came in at $169 million, and the balance sheet showed $1.9 billion in debt against $663 million in cash after redeeming a portion of senior secured notes and completing part of a key equipment lease buy-out.

The company added about $565 million in new contract value since its January fleet status update, lifting contracted floater utilization and supporting a backlog of $7.5 billion anchored by a three-year Petrobras extension for the Noble Courage and a five-well Woodside contract for the Noble Deliverer. Noble maintained its 2026 revenue and adjusted EBITDA guidance while lifting capital expenditure plans to fund the Noble Deliverer’s reactivation, and its board declared a $0.50 per share second-quarter dividend as management highlighted tightening floater markets, improving dayrates and stronger earnings visibility for stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (NE) stock is a Hold with a $50.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Noble Corporation stock, see the NE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved profitability and strong operating/free cash flow, supported by a constructive earnings outlook and large backlog. Offsetting factors are the major 2025 revenue data inconsistency, increased leverage versus prior years, and technically overextended momentum signals. Valuation is mixed: a strong dividend yield is tempered by a higher P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on NE stock, click here.

More about Noble Corporation

Noble Corporation plc is an offshore drilling contractor that provides contract drilling services to oil and gas companies worldwide, operating a fleet of floaters and jackups. The company focuses on high-specification rigs, including Tier-1 drillships and ultra-harsh environment jackups, with a significant presence in key offshore basins such as Brazil, the U.S. Gulf of Mexico, West Africa and Asia-Pacific.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $7.9B

KE Holdings Inc. Sponsored ADR Class A ( (BEKE) ) just unveiled an update.

KE Holdings Inc. reported a series of share repurchases carried out between April 1 and April 17, 2026, under its existing buyback mandate, without changing its total issued share count as of April 17, 2026. The company repurchased multiple tranches of its Class A ordinary shares on the New York Stock Exchange at prices mostly around USD 5–5.5 per share, including 737,058 shares on April 17 for about USD 4 million, bringing total repurchases under the mandate to 140,112,036 shares, equivalent to 3.89% of issued shares at the time of authorization.

These transactions, disclosed through a Form 6-K filed on April 27, 2026, signal continued execution of KE Holdings’ capital management strategy aimed at reducing share float and potentially supporting earnings per share and valuation. The buybacks also trigger a moratorium until May 17, 2026, during which the company is restricted from issuing new shares or transferring treasury shares without exchange approval, a constraint investors will monitor alongside the impact of lower share availability on market liquidity and pricing.

The most recent analyst rating on (BEKE) stock is a Buy with a $24.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on KE Holdings Inc. Sponsored ADR Class A stock, see the BEKE Stock Forecast page.

However, declining profitability margins and a high P/E ratio suggest caution. data.title: Gold Royalty Corp. Reports Record Q1 2026 Preliminary Results and Reaffirms Full-Year Guidance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from TPT Global Tech ( (TPTW) ).

Gold Royalty Corp., a Vancouver-based gold-focused royalty and streaming company listed on the NYSE American, finances mining projects through net smelter return royalties and streaming interests on gold assets mainly in the Americas. By avoiding direct mine operation and instead backing external operators, it seeks diversified, sustainable exposure to precious metals production while targeting attractive long-term returns for investors.

On April 27, 2026, Gold Royalty reported record preliminary results for the first quarter of 2026, with Total Revenue, Land Agreement Proceeds and Interest reaching $9.4 million and revenue hitting $7.2 million, equivalent to 1,920 gold equivalent ounces, up 162% year over year and nearly 80% quarter over quarter. Management attributed the performance to its acquisition strategy, highlighting contributions from newly acquired Pedra Branca and Borborema royalties, reaffirmed 2026 production guidance of 7,500 to 9,300 GEOs, and set early May dates for its earnings release and call as well as a June 18, 2026 capital markets day, underscoring growing scale and visibility for shareholders and prospective investors.

The company’s continued reliance on non-IFRS metrics such as Total Revenue, Land Agreement Proceeds and Interest and GEOs reflects an effort to align its disclosure with peers in the royalty sector. However, its dependence on third-party operators’ disclosures for underlying asset data underscores an information risk that stakeholders must weigh against the strong reported growth and the potential upside from ramp-ups at assets like DPM Metals’ Vareš mine and Fortitude Gold’s County Line operation.

More about TPT Global Tech

Gold Royalty Corp. is a gold-focused royalty and streaming company that provides financing solutions to the metals and mining industry. The company invests in high-quality, sustainable mining operations to build a diversified portfolio of precious metals royalty and streaming interests, consisting primarily of net smelter return royalties on gold properties across the Americas.

By focusing on royalties and streams rather than direct mine ownership, Gold Royalty targets long-term, lower-risk exposure to gold production. Its business model aims to generate superior risk-adjusted returns for shareholders while relying on operating partners for exploration, development and production on the underlying assets.

The company is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker GROY and is headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia. Its portfolio includes interests in projects operated by third parties, meaning Gold Royalty depends heavily on public disclosures from mine operators and has limited direct access to the underlying properties for verification purposes.

Current Market Cap: $735.7K

data.title: Options Volatility and Implied Earnings Moves This Week, April 27 – May 01, 2026
data.description:
This week, several major companies will be reporting earnings. Among them are Apple (AAPL), Amazon (AMZN), Microsoft (MSFT), Alphabet Class A (GOOGL), Meta Platforms (META).

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Forget margin or options. Here's how the pros trade AMZN

Ahead of this week’s major earnings announcements, TipRanks has calculated the expected moves of these companies’ stocks. We use the at-the-money straddle of the options whose post-earnings expiration dates are closest to the earnings announcement date.

Note that options volatility tends to be high in the days leading up to an earnings announcement, due to uncertainty around the earnings. Investors don’t know whether the earnings will be positive or negative, so the price of options (aka the option premium) rises.

Furthermore, after the earnings announcement, because the uncertainty has been resolved, the price of options (the option premium) decreases substantially. This is known as the volatility crush.

Here are the major companies reporting this week and their expected earnings moves. Click on any ticker to see additional data about options on the stock, including real-time expected earnings moves, prices, volume, and open interest.

data.title: Smith+Nephew to Showcase Growth-Driving Surgical Innovations at June Investor Event
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Smith & Nephew Snats ( (SNN) ).

Smith+Nephew, the London-listed medical technology group, will host an expert surgeon insights event for investors and analysts in London on 9 June 2026, the company said on 27 April 2026. The half‑day session will showcase innovation platforms underpinning its RISE strategy, including the REGENETEN and CARTIHEAL implants, the TESSA Spatial Surgery System, the PICO single‑use negative pressure wound therapy system, and the CORI, AETOS and new LANDMARK orthopaedic systems.

Chief executive Deepak Nath and chief financial officer John Rogers, joined by executive committee members, will lead the event, which will feature product demonstrations and Q&A with both surgeons and management. Presentations from leading US surgeons will highlight trends such as the shift of joint replacement to ambulatory surgery centres, growing use of robotics and spatial surgery, and efforts to reduce surgical site complications, underscoring Smith+Nephew’s push to position its portfolio at the forefront of orthopaedics and sports medicine practice.

The most recent analyst rating on (SNN) stock is a Hold with a $32.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smith & Nephew Snats stock, see the SNN Stock Forecast page.

Smith+Nephew is a global medical technology company focused on the repair, regeneration and replacement of soft and hard tissue across Orthopaedics, Sports Medicine & ENT, and Advanced Wound Management. Founded in Hull, UK, in 1856, it now operates in around 100 countries, generated $6.2 billion in sales in 2025, employs about 17,000 people and is a constituent of the FTSE 100 index.

data.title: Organon Agrees to All-Cash Acquisition by Sun Pharma
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Organon ( (OGN) ) has issued an update.

On April 26, 2026, Organon agreed to be acquired by an affiliate of Sun Pharmaceutical Industries in an all-cash merger valuing the women’s health and general medicines specialist at US$11.75 billion, or US$14.00 per share, a 103% premium to its unaffected April 9, 2026 close, with closing targeted for early 2027 subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The deal will take Organon private and off the NYSE, reshapes Sun Pharma into a stronger global force in branded generics, women’s health and biosimilars, and includes detailed cash-out and rollover treatment for equity awards, a US$120 million termination fee framework, and leadership continuity as interim CEO Joseph Morrissey and interim executive chair Carrie Cox were both confirmed in their roles on a permanent basis the same day.

The transaction is positioned to accelerate Sun Pharma’s growth strategy, with Organon’s portfolio and 140-country footprint expected to help vault the buyer into the top 25 global pharma companies by revenue and nearly double combined EBITDA and cash flow, improving leverage. For Organon’s shareholders, the board’s endorsement of the premium cash offer provides immediate value but also locks in a path to loss of public-market upside, while employees and other stakeholders face a transition in ownership under a structure that preserves key long-term incentive plans but subjects the company to integration, regulatory and closing risks over a timeline that could extend to January 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (OGN) stock is a Sell with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Organon stock, see the OGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OGN is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weakened profitability and high leverage despite solid cash generation. Technicals are supportive with the stock above major moving averages, but overbought indicators raise near-term risk. Valuation is relatively low on P/E, while earnings-call guidance suggests flat fundamentals with ongoing margin and execution headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on OGN stock, click here.

More about Organon

Organon & Co. is a global healthcare company spun off from Merck in 2021, focused on women’s health and general medicines, including biosimilars. Its portfolio of more than 70 products is sold in over 140 countries, with major markets in the U.S., Europe, China, Canada and Brazil, supported by six manufacturing facilities across the EU and emerging markets.

Headquartered in Jersey City, New Jersey, Organon positions itself as a leader in women’s health while expanding access and affordability of essential treatments worldwide. The company’s legacy of strong brand equity and trusted relationships with healthcare providers and regulators underpins its strategy and market presence.

On April 26, 2026, Organon agreed to be acquired by Sun Pharmaceutical Holdings USA, an affiliate of India’s Sun Pharmaceutical Industries, in an all-cash merger valuing Organon at US$11.75 billion, or US$14.00 per share, a 103% premium to its unaffected April 9, 2026 closing price. The deal, which will take Organon private and lead to its NYSE delisting once completed, is backed by committed debt financing and requires shareholder and global antitrust and FDI approvals, with closing targeted for early 2027.

Under the merger terms, Organon stockholders will receive cash for their common shares, while stock options that are in the money will be cashed out and underwater options cancelled. Pre-2026 restricted and performance stock units will vest and convert into cash at closing, whereas later grants will roll into cash-based awards under Sun Pharma with similar service-based vesting, aligning employee incentives during the transition.

The transaction is designed to bolster Sun Pharma’s established brands and branded generics franchise, make it a top-three global women’s health player and the world’s seventh-largest biosimilars company, and nearly double combined EBITDA and cash flow, improving leverage metrics. For Organon investors, the board highlighted the immediate, compelling value of the cash offer, while deal protections include a no-shop clause, matching rights and a US$120 million termination fee if Organon accepts a superior proposal.

The merger remains subject to a majority vote of Organon shareholders, U.S. Hart-Scott-Rodino clearance, non-U.S. antitrust and foreign investment approvals and the absence of a material adverse effect or prohibitive legal orders, with a long-stop date of January 26, 2027. If completed, Organon will become a wholly owned subsidiary of Sun Pharma; both sides have outlined extensive regulatory covenants and affiliate guarantees to support execution amid potential competing bids and regulatory risks.

Alongside the deal announcement, Organon finalized key leadership decisions on April 26, 2026, confirming Joseph Morrissey as permanent chief executive officer after serving in an interim capacity since October 26, 2025. The company also made Carrie S. Cox, who had been interim executive chair since October 26, 2025, its executive chair on a non-interim basis, with no changes to the compensation arrangements for either executive.

Average Trading Volume: 5,839,163

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.93B

Learn more about OGN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

On April 22, 2026, GAMCO Natural Resources, Gold & Income Trust entered into a sales agreement with G.research, LLC to offer and sell up to 1,000,000 common shares of beneficial interest in at-the-market transactions, with a minimum sale price set at no less than the then-current net asset value per share plus the sales manager’s commission. The offering is conducted under the fund’s existing shelf registration statement, supported by a prospectus supplement dated April 24, 2026, and it commenced on April 24, 2026, giving the fund additional flexibility to raise equity capital over time, which may impact its asset base, trading liquidity, and distribution capacity for shareholders.

The fund’s reliance on at-the-market issuance allows it to potentially align capital raising with market demand and prevailing share prices, helping to manage dilution while expanding the fund’s scale within the natural resources and gold investment segment. Legal opinions on the validity of the newly issued shares have been provided and incorporated into the registration materials, underscoring regulatory compliance and formalizing the framework under which these incremental offerings to investors will proceed.

More about GAMCO Natural Resources. Gold & Income Trust

GAMCO Natural Resources, Gold & Income Trust is a closed-end investment fund listed on the NYSE that focuses on natural resources and gold-related securities while seeking to generate income for shareholders. The fund invests in a portfolio of commodity-linked and gold-oriented assets, positioning itself to provide both exposure to resource markets and regular distributions to investors.

data.title: Adagio Medical Posts Strong Pivotal Results for VT Ablation
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Adagio Medical Holdings ( (ADGM) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 26, 2026, Adagio Medical reported positive six‑month pivotal results from its FULCRUM‑VT IDE trial of the vCLAS ventricular ablation system in patients with ischemic and non‑ischemic structural heart disease. The study met safety and effectiveness endpoints, showing 98% acute non‑inducibility of targeted ventricular tachycardias, 84% freedom from implantable cardioverter defibrillator shocks, 59% freedom from VT recurrence, and a 2.4% major adverse event rate.

The results demonstrated equivalent performance in ischemic and non‑ischemic cardiomyopathy, significant reductions in ICD shocks and VT‑related hospital readmissions, and broad de‑escalation of amiodarone use. These pivotal data, presented at the Heart Rhythm Society 2026 conference, position ULTA and the vCLAS system as a potential new benchmark for endocardial VT ablation and will support Adagio’s planned FDA premarket approval application, with implications for both clinical practice and the large VT patient population.

On April 10, 2026, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. notified SharonAI, Inc. of its irrevocable decision to prepay in full a $50 million senior secured convertible promissory note tied to its acquisition of Texas Critical Data Centers LLC. data.title: SK Telecom to Dispose of Treasury Shares for Director and Executive Stock Compensation
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sk Telecom ( (SKM) ) has issued an update.

On April 27, 2026, SK Telecom’s board approved the disposal of 51,952 common treasury shares, valued at an estimated ₩5.20 billion based on a reference price of ₩100,000 per share, to be executed over the counter between April 28 and May 31, 2026. The transaction, facilitated by SK Securities, remains within the treasury share plan endorsed at the March 26, 2026 annual meeting and follows a reduction of treasury stock holdings to about 1.79 million shares, or 0.83% of outstanding common shares.

The company will use 4,860 of these shares as stock compensation for five independent non-executive directors under a program linked to enterprise value, and allocate roughly 49,152 shares as long-term incentive stock awards to 128 executives and former executives. By funding director and executive pay with existing treasury stock rather than cash or new issuance, SK Telecom aligns leadership incentives with shareholder value while avoiding capital dilution and signaling continued emphasis on performance-based governance.

The most recent analyst rating on (SKM) stock is a Sell with a $27.96 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sk Telecom stock, see the SKM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SKM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKM is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by the sharp profitability and return deterioration and a cautious earnings-call outlook tied to cybersecurity incident impacts and dividend reduction. These risks are partially offset by strong cash generation, manageable leverage, and a bullish technical trend (though currently overbought), while valuation is only moderately supportive given a ~27 P/E and ~2.7% yield.

More about Sk Telecom

SK Telecom Co., Ltd. is a leading South Korean telecommunications operator headquartered in Seoul, providing mobile and fixed-line voice and data services as well as related ICT offerings. The company focuses on the domestic telecom market while also expanding into digital and platform-based services, positioning itself as a core player in Korea’s communications and technology infrastructure.
